entity.summary: Decentralized derivatives exchange protocol whose first perpetual market launched on Ethereum on 2020-04-20. The protocol later moved from the StarkEx-based v3 deployment to the independent Cosmos-SDK-based dYdX Chain, whose mainnet launched on 2023-10-26 and reached full-production trading in November 2023.
entity.notes: Entity-level umbrella record. HEI uses the first decentralized perpetual-market launch as the operational exchange start marker. v3 and dYdX Chain are modeled as lifecycle deployments of the same protocol identity rather than separate entities.

events.title: dYdX launched its first decentralized perpetual market
events.description: dYdX launched a BTC-USDC perpetual contract market on Ethereum on 2020-04-20, marking the protocol's first production decentralized perpetual exchange product and the operational start used by HEI for the exchange entity.
events.notes: Earlier lending and margin products existed, but HEI uses the first perpetual exchange launch as the cleanest exchange start marker.

events.title: dYdX Chain mainnet launched and protocol migration began
events.description: The community-launched dYdX Chain mainnet went live on 2023-10-26 using the Cosmos SDK and CometBFT. Markets initially operated in post-only mode, and governance enabled full-production trading in November 2023 as the ecosystem migrated away from the Ethereum/StarkEx v3 deployment.
events.notes: Classified as token_migration because the transition included both protocol deployment migration and DYDX token migration to the new chain.

evidence.title: dYdX Launches BTC Perpetual Contract Market
evidence.notes: Primary launch announcement for the first decentralized perpetual contract market.

evidence.title: dYdX - 2020 Review
evidence.notes: Primary retrospective confirming that dYdX built and launched its first perpetual-contract protocol in 2020.

evidence.title: New Trading Pairs Considerations
evidence.notes: Foundation source giving the 2023-10-26 mainnet launch date and the later full-production trading milestones.

evidence.title: Expanded Utility of DYDX on the dYdX Chain
evidence.notes: Primary source describing the community adoption of dYdX Chain as the next protocol version and the migration of DYDX token utility to the L1 chain.

evidence.title: dYdX Chain Documentation
evidence.notes: Current official documentation describing the active dYdX Chain software and architecture.
